    metadata: Metadata {
        title: Some(

        sort_artist: None,
        arrangers: [],

        duration: None,
        tags: [],
        custom: [],
    },
    lines: [
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "title",
                value: Some(
                    "Out-of-range Transpose",
                ),
                kind: Title,
                selector: None,
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "transpose",
                value: Some(
                    "999",
                ),
                kind: Transpose,
                selector: None,
            },
        ),
        Lyrics(
            LyricsLine {
                segments: [
                    LyricsSegment {
                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "G",
                                detail: Some(

                                        root: G,
                                        root_accidental: None,
                                        quality: Major,
                                        extension: None,
                                        bass_note: None,
                                    },
                                ),
                                display: None,
                            },
                        ),
                        text: "Hello ",
                        spans: [],

                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "C",
